name: FinTV
description: FinTV turns your Jellyfin library into always-on broadcast channels with 30-minute lineup grids, smart scheduling, commercial breaks, channel logos, WeatherStar weather channel, and M3U/XMLTV Live TV integration.
overview: Simulated live TV channels with lineups, commercials, and IPTV streaming

versions.changelog:
- Add Cancel Generate All button on the AI tab to stop the background staggered generate-all job
- Queue lineup Rebuild and Rebuild All in the background so admin requests return immediately instead of timing out with Error processing request
- AI Generate All runs day-by-day across channels: day 1 lineup+playout for each channel, then day 2 playout for each channel, through the full horizon; clears stale playout before rebuilding
- AI lineups group TV series into 1-4 episode blocks with occasional 5-6 episode mini-marathons in flagship dayparts (about 1-2 per week)
- OpenSwim catalog and AI lineups prioritize Nickelodeon, Disney Channel, Fox Kids, and Cartoon Network style kid-rated shows from any year
- Rename Slappy channel 6pm block from Animation Domination to Slappy's Toon Takeover
- Clarify OpenSwim has no release year cap; catalog and AI lineups include any-year kid-rated TV-PG shows and movies
- Fix Cops And Robbers catalog matching animated spy comedies like American Dad via loose CIA/FBI plot keywords; exclude animation and require crime/thriller genres for restricted plot matches
- Fix lineup grid showing "Candidate" instead of show titles or "Filter query" when Jellyfin 12 returns camelCase slot candidate kind strings
- Fix AI lineup generation dropping FlashBack and Retro picks when catalog items lack a release year in Jellyfin metadata
- Fill empty AI lineup slots from the channel catalog instead of only generic filter-query placeholders
- Fix Retro TV, FlashBack, and other series lineups not building playout: episodes now inherit parent series year and genre rules instead of being rejected
- Fix empty Live TV guide and EBS playback when future playout exists but nothing is scheduled for right now; hourly builder rebuilds from today instead of skipping
- Remove Playwright .NET driver from the plugin zip on Windows and Linux; FinTV Jellyfin Docker image provides the driver via PLAYWRIGHT_DRIVER_SEARCH_PATH
- Bundle Linux Playwright driver in the plugin zip so weather capture can call Playwright.CreateAsync() while Chromium runs in the Docker sidecar
- Fix Special Presentation fixed-items editor crashing with bindCandidateRowActions is not defined
- Fix missing channel logos after plugin updates by always merging newly bundled logos and refreshing the logo index on Apply Logos to Channels
- Share WeatherStar Docker network namespace with Jellyfin (container:Jellyfin) like the Playwright sidecar; auto-recreate on stale attachment and show network status on the Weather tab
- Skip host.docker.internal rewrite for WeatherStar when both Playwright and WeatherStar share Jellyfin loopback
- Bundle official Past Tense News, YouTube TV, and That's Funny logos from open-channel-logos fintv2
- Weather channel lineup and EPG use 24 one-hour blocks instead of one continuous guide cell
- YouTube TV AI catalog restricted to the Jellyfin TV library named YouTube
- Fix Playwright CDP not reachable after Jellyfin container recreate by detecting stale network-namespace attachment and auto-recreating the sidecar on Start
- Improve Playwright tab status with stale-network diagnostics, container refs, and clearer Unraid recovery guidance
- AI Apply Lineup rebuilds Live TV guide playout by default with a single Apply Lineup + Rebuild Guide button
- Disable HTTP proxy for Playwright CDP health probes inside Docker
- Add Playwright admin tab with Start/Stop Docker sidecar controls and moved auto-start on Jellyfin startup setting
- Fix Live TV guide empty for non-weather channels by rebuilding playout when lineups are saved
- Show playout horizon warning on Lineups tab when the EPG has no schedule built yet
- FinTV IPTV streaming uses Jellyfin hardware transcoding settings (VAAPI, QSV, NVENC, encoder preset, and device path) when enabled in Dashboard playback settings
- AI lineups keep movies in release chronological order (year and premiere date) with marathon channels repacking movies back-to-back earliest first
- Extend AI playout by one day when the horizon drops to 13 days instead of rebuilding all 14
- Run FinTV AI lineup scheduled task daily to append the next day for eligible channels
- Stagger AI Generate All: one channel and one day of playout at a time until 14 days are built for every channel
- Add Generate All progress status in the AI tab with live polling
- Add FinTV scheduled task for AI lineup auto-apply on channel add (14-day playout rebuild)
- Queue AI auto-apply when preset channels are updated with Update existing
- Fix AI Generate All 504 gateway timeout by queueing bulk lineup generation in the background
- Fix AI catalog for FlashBack and Retro by not applying channel year filters twice with different logic
